SENIOR SOFTWARE ENGINEER
Senior Software Engineer with 8 years of experience in full-stack development.

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Highly skilled software engineer with proven expertise in designing and implementing scalable web applications. Strong background in system architecture, API development, and database optimization. Experienced in leading technical teams and mentoring junior developers.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go
Frontend: React, Vue.js, Next.js, Redux
Backend: Node.js, Express, Django, FastAPI
Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch
Cloud: AWS, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes
DevOps: CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Terraform
Tools: Git, Jira, Slack, Figma

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer - Tech Corp (2021 - Present)
- Led team of 5 engineers in designing microservices architecture for real-time data platform
- Optimized database queries reducing latency by 40%
- Implemented automated CI/CD pipeline reducing deployment time from 2 hours to 15 minutes
- Mentored 3 junior developers, guiding them to senior roles

Senior Full Stack Engineer - StartupXYZ (2019 - 2021)
- Built real-time collaboration platform using Node.js, React, and WebSockets
- Designed API endpoints handling 1M+ requests/day
- Implemented Redis caching reducing database load by 60%
- Led code review process and established coding standards

Full Stack Developer - Digital Agency (2017 - 2019)
- Developed 20+ web applications using React and Node.js
- Managed PostgreSQL databases with complex queries
- Implemented responsive UI designs using CSS Grid and Flexbox
- Worked with cross-functional teams (designers, PMs, QA)

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
University of Technology (2016)

CERTIFICATIONS
- AWS Solutions Architect Professional (2022)
- Kubernetes Administrator Certified (2021)

PROJECTS
Real-time Analytics Dashboard - Built full-stack dashboard processing 100K events/second
E-commerce Platform - Designed and implemented microservices architecture for marketplace
API Gateway - Developed rate-limited API gateway handling 10M requests/day

KEY ACHIEVEMENTS
- 40% reduction in API latency through optimization
- Mentored team from 2 to 5 senior engineers
- Achieved 99.95% uptime for critical systems
- Reduced infrastructure costs by 35% through optimization
